privacyPage.pageSubtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data in Klosify CRM.
privacyPage.controllerDomicile: , domiciled in Colombia, is the controller of the personal data collected through the application accessible at
privacyPage.controllerScope: This policy describes how we collect, use, store, and protect the data of Klosify CRM users ("Clients") and of the third parties who interact with them through the integrated platforms — Meta (Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp) and others.
privacyPage.data21Item3: OAuth credentials (tokens) issued by Meta to access the Client's Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp accounts — stored encrypted and never exposed to the end user.
privacyPage.subsection22Heading: 2.2. Data Received from Meta (Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp)
privacyPage.data22Intro: When a Client connects their Meta accounts to Klosify CRM, we receive the following data through Meta's official APIs:
privacyPage.data22Item1Text: incoming and outgoing — text, images, audio, video, files, and shared reels. Required permission:
privacyPage.data22Item2Text: on the Client's posts, including the commenter's public username. Permission:
privacyPage.data22Item3Text: of the Client: username, profile picture, account ID, and post IDs. Permission:
privacyPage.data22Item4Text: of the sender of a message (IGSID, name, and profile picture) — only when that person has initiated a conversation with the Client.
privacyPage.data22Item5Text: incoming and outgoing from the number connected by the Client.
privacyPage.data22Item6Label: Leads generated by Facebook Lead Ads
privacyPage.data22Item6Text: : the fields the lead voluntarily filled out in the form.
privacyPage.useIntro: We use the data exclusively to:
privacyPage.useItem1: Display conversations, messages, and leads in the Client's dashboard so they can manage their business relationships.
privacyPage.useItem2: Allow the Client to reply to messages, post comments, and manage their sales pipeline.
privacyPage.useItem3: Run automations configured by the Client (for example, automatically replying to comments containing keywords).
privacyPage.useItem4: AI analysis of conversation content — solely to generate lead scoring, sentiment, and suggestions for the Client.
privacyPage.useItem4Strong: Content is not used to train general AI models.
privacyPage.useNoSellStrong: We do not sell, rent, or transfer data to third parties for advertising purposes.
privacyPage.useNoSellText: We do not use Instagram/WhatsApp messages to send our own or third-party advertising.
privacyPage.thirdPartiesIntro: We share data only with the following subprocessors, all bound by confidentiality and data processing agreements:
privacyPage.thirdPartiesSupabase: — database hosting, media file storage, and serverless functions (servers in the U.S. and Europe).
privacyPage.thirdPartiesOpenAIPre: — processing of conversation content to generate lead scoring and sentiment analysis (used under
privacyPage.thirdPartiesOpenAIPost: mode, with no training on your data).
privacyPage.thirdPartiesMeta: — Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp APIs used to send and receive messages on behalf of the Client.
privacyPage.thirdPartiesOutro: We do not share data with third parties for our own commercial purposes. We do not transfer data to authorities except upon a legally valid judicial request.
privacyPage.retentionItem1: The Client's account data is retained while the subscription is active.
privacyPage.retentionItem2: Messages, conversations, and leads are retained while the Client keeps their account — the Client can delete them at any time from the dashboard.
privacyPage.retentionItem3Pre: After account cancellation, we delete all the Client's data within a maximum of
privacyPage.retentionItem3Post: , except where legally required to retain it.
privacyPage.retentionItem4: Technical logs without personal data are retained for up to 12 months for security auditing.
privacyPage.rightsIntro: In accordance with Law 1581 of 2012 (Colombia) and the GDPR (where applicable), any data subject may:
privacyPage.rightsItem1: Access the information we hold about them.
privacyPage.rightsItem5: File a complaint with the data protection authority (SIC in Colombia).
privacyPage.rightsContactPre: To exercise any of these rights, write to us at
privacyPage.rightsContactPost: . We respond within a maximum of
privacyPage.securityItem1: Encryption in transit (TLS 1.2+) and at rest (AES-256) for all stored data.
privacyPage.securityItem2: Per-organization isolation in the database via Row Level Security (RLS) — each Client can only access their own data.
privacyPage.securityItem3: Meta tokens stored encrypted, never exposed to the frontend.
privacyPage.cookiesText: Klosify CRM uses only technical cookies necessary for session functionality (authentication). We do not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies.
privacyPage.minorsText: Klosify CRM is a B2B product aimed at businesses and professionals over 18 years of age. We do not intentionally collect data from minors. If a Client receives messages from minors through their connected channels, it is the Client's responsibility to comply with applicable regulations.
privacyPage.changesText: We will notify material changes by email at least 15 days in advance. The last updated date appears at the top of this document.
